title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.560 - Payments from pension fund by warrants only
text:
86.560.  Payments from pension fund by warrants only. — All moneys ordered to be paid from such pension fund to any person or persons shall be paid by the treasurer only upon warrants signed by the president of the board and countersigned by the secretary thereof, and no warrants shall be drawn except by the order of the board, duly entered upon the records of the proceedings of the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 9489) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8928
